text:
ああ、あんたか。
もう多くの説明は必要ないだろ？
要はヤツらを殺ってこいってこと。

新しい惑星だろうと、どこだろうと
ヤツらは現れる。
それなら殺し尽くすだけ。

ま、いつも通り殺ってきてよ。
きれいさっぱり消

Oh, it's you. We're past explanations at this
point, yes? All you need to do is kill them--
simple as that.

It doesn't matter if it's a new planet. They
appear anywhere and everywhere, so all we
need to do is kill every last one of them.

Go on and exterminate them as per usual. Wipe
them out of existence.
